reviews.review_msg: Anna is a great prof. But the course is really boring, which means most of the things are common sense but we have to pay three time within Innovation Concentration (240, 338…) Wasted of time and money

Easy class that has a high average that gets curved to B- as all 200 level bus classes. Choose a good group to work with as a lot of your grade comes from that. Very relaxed class and she is always looking to improve each week. Very straight forward
Amazing, GOATED prof, I am writing this in 240 right now. She listens to the feedback of the class and applies it to her lessons. Very chill literally everyone is talking while she is speaking lmao

She was a nice prof and her lectures were enjoyable. Regular in-class guests, who are successful students from SFU was really encouraging. Above all she was kind and caring. She valued feedbacks from students and would improve on them and discuss in class.

She listens, encourages, and adapts to student feedback. While the course is surface-level, can feel childish, and time-wasting, she genuinely cares ab her students. #1 takeaway are the biweekly SFU alumn she brings in, who now have successful businesses/innovations, and they provide real, candid, and applicable business insights. Project is cool.
She is great, but this useless course requires so many things to do. In the class just play your phone, and get ready to do the child's contents!
